3170720.name: Hidden Pets
3170720.description:
Step into an atmosphere of coziness and magic with our new game, designed for those who appreciate the beauty of details and enjoy leisurely, relaxing entertainment! Test your attention and observation skills as you explore a charming world, lovingly hand-drawn with care for every little detail.

Your task is to find cleverly hidden animals that are expertly camouflaged among vibrant landscapes, cozy houses, and mysterious corners of this unique world. Each level is a new challenge, filled with unexpected surprises and adorable characters that will bring a smile and warm emotions.

Gentle background music will help you relax and fully enjoy the experience. It’s the perfect way to unwind after a long day or spend time with your family, as the game is suitable for all ages. Gather your loved ones around the screen and compete to see who can find all the hidden animals the fastest!

Feel like a true explorer as you uncover the secrets of this hand-drawn world and enjoy every moment spent with our game. The cozy atmosphere, beautiful graphics, and engaging gameplay will make it your favorite way to relax and have fun!
3170720.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 保加利亚语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 匈牙利语, 越南语, 希腊语, 丹麦语, 印度尼西亚语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文, 简体中文, 韩语, 荷兰语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 泰语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 芬兰语, 捷克语, 瑞典语, 日语
